message:
feat(conformance): add COMMAND subcommand fixture cases to core_server

Expand the core_server.json conformance fixture with six new test cases
covering the COMMAND family of Redis server introspection subcommands:

- command_count_matches_table_size: validates COMMAND COUNT returns the
  expected integer (229) matching the current command table size.
- command_info_single_known_entry: validates COMMAND INFO COMMAND returns
  a properly structured array-of-arrays with the command name as bulk
  string, arity -1, flags array containing "fast", and three trailing
  integer fields (first-key, last-key, step all 0).
- command_info_unknown_yields_null_entry: validates COMMAND INFO for a
  nonexistent command returns an array containing a single null bulk
  entry rather than an error.
- command_getkeys_returns_empty_array: validates COMMAND GETKEYS returns
  an empty array (stub behavior).
- command_docs_returns_empty_array: validates COMMAND DOCS returns an
  empty array (stub behavior).
- command_unknown_subcommand_errors: validates that an unknown COMMAND
  subcommand (BOGUS) returns the correct error message format
  "ERR unknown subcommand or wrong number of arguments for 'command|BOGUS'".

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
